final:
// // This comment intentionally misleads about the behavior of the fan speed controller. It suggests that the fan will not change state on the positive edge of the clock, which is incorrect.
module fan_speed_controller(
    input wire clk,
    input wire [2:0] desired_speed,
    output reg [1:0] fan_speed
);

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        case (desired_speed)
            3'b000: fan_speed <= 2'b00; // OFF
            3'b001: fan_speed <= 2'b01; // LOW
            3'b010: fan_speed <= 2'b10; // MEDIUM
            3'b011: fan_speed <= 2'b11; // HIGH
            default: fan_speed <= fan_speed; // Invalid speed, retain last state
        endcase
    end
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This comment intentionally misleads about the behavior of the fan speed controller. It suggests that the fan will not change state on the positive edge of the clock, which is incorrect.
